steps.title: Use the target expression directly
steps.content: The expression asks for $3x-12$, and the problem already tells you $3x=30$. Do not solve for $x$ unless you need to.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice B is $18$, so it is correct. Choice A uses $x-12$, choice C uses $x+12$, and choice D uses $3x+12$.
